'''鈭歜-n-t-th''' ('''kabantethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lusitanize|lusitanize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-n-t-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lusitanize|lusitanize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-n-t-th
|-
! Lemma
| kabantethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibantethoko|thibantethoko]] || [[word:jibantethoko|jibantethoko]] || [[word:shibantethoko|shibantethoko]] || [[word:kibantethoko|kibantethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubantethoko|thuthubantethoko]] || [[word:jujubantethoko|jujubantethoko]] || [[word:shushubantethoko|shushubantethoko]] || [[word:kukubantethoko|kukubantethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubantethoko|thubantethoko]] || [[word:jubantethoko|jubantethoko]] || [[word:shubantethoko|shubantethoko]] || [[word:kubantethoko|kubantethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubantethoko|thubantethoko]] || [[word:jubantethoko|jubantethoko]] || [[word:shubantethoko|shubantethoko]] || [[word:kubantethoko|kubantethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebantethoko|thebantethoko]] || [[word:jebantethoko|jebantethoko]] || [[word:shebantethoko|shebantethoko]] || [[word:kebantethoko|kebantethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobantethoko|thothobantethoko]] || [[word:jojobantethoko|jojobantethoko]] || [[word:shoshobantethoko|shoshobantethoko]] || [[word:kokobantethoko|kokobantethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobantethoko|thobantethoko]] || [[word:jobantethoko|jobantethoko]] || [[word:shobantethoko|shobantethoko]] || [[word:kobantethoko|kobantethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobantethoko|thobantethoko]] || [[word:jobantethoko|jobantethoko]] || [[word:shobantethoko|shobantethoko]] || [[word:kobantethoko|kobantethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bantethoko|th忙bantethoko]] || [[word:j忙bantethoko|j忙bantethoko]] || [[word:sh忙bantethoko|sh忙bantethoko]] || [[word:k忙bantethoko|k忙bantethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabantethoko|thathabantethoko]] || [[word:jajabantethoko|jajabantethoko]] || [[word:shashabantethoko|shashabantethoko]] || [[word:kakabantethoko|kakabantethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabantethoko|thabantethoko]] || [[word:jabantethoko|jabantethoko]] || [[word:shabantethoko|shabantethoko]] || [[word:kabantethoko|kabantethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabantethoko|thabantethoko]] || [[word:jabantethoko|jabantethoko]] || [[word:shabantethoko|shabantethoko]] || [[word:kabantethoko|kabantethoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shabantethithi|shabantethithi]] || [[word:shabantethiji|shabantethiji]] || [[word:shabantethishi|shabantethishi]] || [[word:shabantethiki|shabantethiki]]
